title: Build a per-event authz LiveView using ownership pattern
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/missing_authz_handle_event.ex trusts the UI to hide the delete button. Rewrite lib/my_app_web/live/posts_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PostsLive) so handle_event("delete", %{"id" => id}, socket) re-checks post.author_id == socket.assigns.current_user.id server-side before deleting. Deny with put_flash on mismatch. Also use on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_authenticated} at the top. Preserve the rest of the behavior.
tier_rationale: Adds server-side re-check + on_mount. Multi-site fix.
